mapper.select: SELECT dr.id, dr.title, dr.content, dr.media_url, dr.media_type, dr.published_at, dr.score, dr.views, dr.destination_id, d.id AS destination_ref_id, d.name AS destination_name, d.scene_type AS destination_scene_type, d.category AS destination_category, d.heat AS destination_heat, d.rating AS destination_rating, d.description AS destination_description, d.latitude AS destination_latitude, d.longitude AS destination_longitude FROM diary dr LEFT JOIN destination d ON d.id = dr.destination_id

SELECT dr.id, dr.title, dr.content, dr.media_url, dr.media_type, dr.published_at, dr.score, dr.views, dr.destination_id, d.id AS destination_ref_id, d.name AS destination_name, d.scene_type AS destination_scene_type, d.category AS destination_category, d.heat AS destination_heat, d.rating AS destination_rating, d.description AS destination_description, d.latitude AS destination_latitude, d.longitude AS destination_longitude FROM diary dr LEFT JOIN destination d ON d.id = dr.destination_id WHERE dr.id = #{id}

SELECT dr.id, dr.title, dr.content, dr.media_url, dr.media_type, dr.published_at, dr.score, dr.views, dr.destination_id, d.id AS destination_ref_id, d.name AS destination_name, d.scene_type AS destination_scene_type, d.category AS destination_category, d.heat AS destination_heat, d.rating AS destination_rating, d.description AS destination_description, d.latitude AS destination_latitude, d.longitude AS destination_longitude FROM diary dr LEFT JOIN destination d ON d.id = dr.destination_id WHERE LOWER(dr.title) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{title}), '%')

SELECT dr.id, dr.title, dr.content, dr.media_url, dr.media_type, dr.published_at, dr.score, dr.views, dr.destination_id, d.id AS destination_ref_id, d.name AS destination_name, d.scene_type AS destination_scene_type, d.category AS destination_category, d.heat AS destination_heat, d.rating AS destination_rating, d.description AS destination_description, d.latitude AS destination_latitude, d.longitude AS destination_longitude FROM diary dr LEFT JOIN destination d ON d.id = dr.destination_id WHERE LOWER(dr.title) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(dr.content) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diary(title, content, media_type, media_url, published_at, score, views, destination_id) VALUES(#{title}, #{content}, #{mediaType}, #{mediaUrl}, #{publishedAt}, #{score}, #{views}, #{destination.id})
mapper.update: UPDATE diary SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, media_type = #{mediaType}, media_url = #{mediaUrl}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, score = #{score}, views = #{views}, destination_id = #{destination.id} WHERE id = #{id}
